objects.label: bed
objects.description: beige striped bed with wood headboard
objects.long_form_open_description: Bed with a beige-and-gray horizontally striped duvet and two matching rectangular pillows set against a dark polished wooden paneled headboard; linens are neatly made with faint creases and the pillows are slightly askew at the head — object occupies the foreground and appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

matching nightstands
two table lamps
window with blinds and dark curtains
bed made with striped bedspread

objects.label: nightstand
objects.description: dark wooden nightstand, three drawers
objects.long_form_open_description: Dark stained wooden nightstand with three stacked drawers and metal pull handles, rectangular glossy top with small objects visible, carved base molding and curved side detail; mostly full-frontal view with slight shadowing — estimated distance from camera ~1.0 m.
